title: Mechnology NextXen
description: a minecraft modpacks focus on performance optimization and game improve.
body:
# A performance optimization, experience improvement and beautification integration package.
**Ideal for people with low performance devices and offers nice fps boosts and interface beautification.** Doesn't take up too much performance, **but is slow to start (hopefully you can understand that)**. Although I have set up most of the content for you, **_there are still some things you need to adjust according to the actual situation:_**
1. If you are a Nvidia user, please add a Nvidium mod.
2. This integration package comes with a few shader and enable MakeUp UltraFast by default, if the performance of your device is really poor, do not use a window full-screen game, or just turn off the shader.
3. The GUI is tweaked by me, if you don't like it you can configure it in the module menu.
4. what did i add in it(not only these)?
- Skin Layers 3D
- c2me
- Reese's Sodium Options
- REI
- Xaero's World Map
- Xaero's Minimap
- Dynamic FPS
- Dynamic Crosshair
- Neat
- Krypton
- Lithium
- Chat Heads
- Mod Menu
- Sodium
- AppleSkin
- Entity Culling

Visit https://github.com/Redersha/Mechnology-NextXen-v1/issues

Having downloaded this modpack indicates your agreement and firm support for the following viewpoints: 
1. Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau belong to China.
2. Violating Chinese territory (including the aforementioned) is incorrect.

(I'm sorry that there may be something you can't understand in the above, because I used a translator and it's impossible to express my meaning completely accurately.
